result.summary: Found 4 issues on this BetRivers casino page, including a critical data display error, major layout clipping issues, and minor navigation truncation problems.

issues.description: The 'Cop the Lot' game card displays a negative jackpot value of '-$6,266.13', which is logically incorrect for a jackpot amount and suggests a data rendering bug.
issues.suggestion: Investigate the jackpot value data source and ensure negative values are either handled gracefully or prevented from displaying. Jackpot values should always be positive or show a fallback state.

issues.description: Game cards in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are visually clipped on the right edge, showing partial images and truncated titles (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...'). There are no visible scroll indicators or affordances to hint that horizontal scrolling is available.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible horizontal scroll indicator, arrow button, or fade/gradient overlay on the right edge to communicate that additional content is scrollable. Alternatively, ensure the last partially visible card is clearly cut to signal scrollability.

issues.description: The top navigation filter bar clips the last item 'Hot Ga...' without any visual cue that more items exist beyond the visible area.
issues.suggestion: Add a right-side fade gradient or a visible scroll arrow on the navigation tab bar to indicate that more categories exist and are horizontally scrollable.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' navigation label is truncated mid-word, making it unreadable and unprofessional.
issues.suggestion: Ensure navigation labels are not truncated, either by reducing font size, abbreviating intentionally, or ensuring minimum card width accommodates the full label text.
